examples.title: Radar Screen
examples.content: A target appears at (5 km, 45°) on radar. Distance 5 km from center, at 45° angle. Polar is natural for radar.

examples.title: Circular Motion
examples.content: A ball spins in a circle: always 2m from center, angle changes with time. Polar (r=2, θ=changes) is simpler than Cartesian.

examples.title: Compass Bearing
examples.content: Navigate: 'go 10 km at bearing 30° northeast.' That's polar (r=10, θ=30). Much easier than (x, y) coordinates.
